subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Refuge, my Shelter, my Goal and my heart's Desire! Thou beholdest me, O my Lord, immersed in the depths [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا موئلی و مهربی و مقصدی و منائی ترانی یا الهی مستغرقا فی غمار
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for the departed, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
